entry.title: IDC W52P1J17D0043 (P00008) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W0H9 US ARMY AVN & MISSLES CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODERNIZED TARGET ACQUISITION DESIGNATION SIGHT/PILOT NIGHT VISION SENSOR (M-TADS/PNVS) SYSTEMS, SUBCOMPONENT PRODUCTION, AND TECHNICAL SERVICES IN SUPPORT OF APACHE ATTACK HELICOPTER.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W0H9 US ARMY AVN & MISSLES CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADMINISTRATIVE MOD TO REVISE SECTION B, E AND G TO ADD CLIN 0029 (GUSSET BRACKET MODIFICATIONS). THIS WILL BE A FIRM FIXED PRICE CLIN. INSPECTION ACCEPTANCE IS AT ORIGIN AND THE PSC IS J016.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
